data.title: Diane Ladd's cause of death revealed weeks after legendary actress dies at 89: report
data.description: Diane Ladd's death certificate reveals she died from acute respiratory failure at 89. The Academy Award-nominated actress suffered from lung disease.

data.author: Nikhil Kulkarni
data.title: I’m a cricket tragic, and a dad. This statistic saddens me
data.description: When I moved to Australia from India seven years ago, I was thrilled to be moving from one cricket-obsessed country to another. Now I want to inspire dads who love the game.
